task_description: Add SNS notifications for pipeline completion and errors. Create two encrypted SNS topics (Completed, Failed), integrate SNS Publish tasks into the Step Functions state machine on success and error paths, ensure least-privilege IAM, and update ARCHITECTURE.md. Follow strict TDD (failing tests first).

verification.summary: All 40 tests pass (28 existing + 12 new SNS tests). cdk synth succeeds cleanly. 100% code coverage on cdk_base/. Tests verify SNS topic count, KMS encryption, state machine definition content, IAM permissions (sns:Publish and kms:GenerateDataKey*), error handling on notification steps, ordering, and distinct result paths. Semantic review v2 APPROVED.
